use_policy: Do not use this snapshot as ROCm hardware-selection evidence. Refresh Runpod availability and choose AMD GPUs with ROCm-supported gfx targets before benchmarking.
notes: The source snapshot listed NVIDIA GPUs and CUDA compute capabilities.
CUDA-origin prices and timings were not copied as ROCm evidence.
Create a new dated pricing file after querying current Runpod availability for AMD ROCm hardware.
refresh_checklist: Query current Runpod catalog and stock.
Filter for AMD GPUs with ROCm support.
Verify hipcc, rocminfo, rocm-smi, and profiler tooling in the image.
Record GPU model, gfx target, ROCm version, driver/runtime metadata, price, and stock status.
